name: Strawberry Waldorf Salad
directions: Combine the apples, walnuts and celery.  Add the strawberries and green grapes.
To make the dressing, whip the whipping cream and fold in the remaining ingredients.  Dress  salad with this mixture and chill well.

similar.name: Bits of Fruit Salad With Strawberry Yogurt Dressing

name: Frozen Fruit Salad
directions: Cut fruit into small pieces.
Pour lemon juice over bananas and let stand for ten minutes.
Mix all the fruits together, sweeten to taste and let stand ten more minutes.
Drain all juice from the fruits; stir in mayonnaise and fold in whipped cream.
Pour mixture into a 5 x 9" metal pan and freeze.
Arrange salad greens on chilled plates and place a portion of fruit salad on top.

name: Holiday Fruit Salad
directions: in large bowl, dissolve gelatin in boiling water.  slice bananas into gelatin mixture.  add frozen strawberries and undrained crushed pineapple.
reserve half of the mixture at room temerature.  pour remaining mixture into 13x9-inch pan.
refrigerate 1 hour or until firm.
in mixer bowl, beat cream cheese with sour cream and sugar, spread over chilled layer.
gently spoon reserved gelatin mixture on top.  refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
cut into squares, serve on lettuce lined salad plates.  garnish with additional pineapple and mint leaves if desired.

similar.name: Bits of Fruit Salad With Strawberry Yogurt Dressing

name: Magic Fruit Salad
directions: Rinse fresh fruit. Chop into bite-sized chunks.
Sprinkle pudding mix over fruit. Add milk and toss well. Refrigerate for 5 minutes.
Refrigerate leftovers within 2-3 hours.

name: Fruit Salad
directions: Mix juices and water, then boil. Mix in sugar, cornstarch and salt. Add sugar mix to juice mix and turn heat down stirring. Break egg in and stir. Remove from heat. Cool.
Thin with milk and mix with fruit.

similar.name: Bits of Fruit Salad With Strawberry Yogurt Dressing

name: Fruit Salad
directions: Put these ingredints in a bowl strawberries and grapes. sprinkle with 2 packs of the sweet n low. cover and keep in refridge over night.
the next day mix together cream cheese, vanilla, 3 packs sweet n low and cool whip. add to the strawberrys and grapes.
after this is mixed add the bananas and fold into the fruit mix.
top with granola cereal.

similar.name: Bits of Fruit Salad With Strawberry Yogurt Dressing

name: Sugar Free Sweet Fruit Salad
directions: Mix all items together in a large mixing bowl. Do not add anything to the lemonade or pudding powders; the powder itself is all that is needed to go along with the other ingredients above.
Chill and serve.
(This salad lasts several days; the lemonade prevents the apples and bananas from turning brown.).

similar.name: Bits of Fruit Salad With Strawberry Yogurt Dressing

name: Bits of Fruit Salad With Strawberry Yogurt Dressing
directions: Pour the canned fruit, with its juice, into a serving bowl. Core the apple but do not peel it. Cut the apple into bite-size pieces and add the pieces to the bowl. Stir to coat the apples with the juice.
Slice the banana and add it to the bowl. Add the grapes, cutting them in half, if desired. Set the fruit aside, without stirring, until just before serving.
When you are ready to serve the salad, stir the fruit and serve it in small bowls. Spoon a little of the dressing on top of each bowl and pass the rest at the table.

NOTE: If you are waiting a while to serve the salad, don't peel, slice, or add the banana until right before serving. The banana can hold in the salad for only about 10 minutes before turning brown and mushy.

Strawberry Yogurt Dressing: Pour the yogurt into a small mixing bowl. Add the orange zest (if using) and the orange juice. Stir until well combined. Spoon over fruit salad or refrigerate, covered, until ready to serve, up to 24 hours.

name: Creamy Fruit Salad
directions: In a bowl, combine first 4 ingredients, in a small mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, yogurt and sugar until smooth; pour over fruit and toss to coat.
Chill 15 minutes.
